properties.name: Parent
properties.doc: Read-only; parent item's UUID as a string.

properties.name: Position_X
properties.doc: X coordinate of the item's position.

properties.name: Position_Y
properties.doc: Y coordinate of the item's position.

properties.name: Layer
properties.doc: Layer the item is on; wildcard- and rename-aware.

properties.name: Net
properties.doc: Net of a connected item (net-code compare).

properties.name: Net_Class
properties.doc: Plain string name of the effective netclass.

properties.name: Type
properties.doc: Object type name (Pad, Track, Via, Zone, ...); wildcard-aware on RHS.

properties.name: Enable_Teardrops
properties.doc: Teardrops enabled on this connected item.

properties.name: Not_in_Schematic
properties.doc: Footprint is not present in the schematic.

properties.name: Solderpaste_Margin_Ratio_Override
properties.doc: Solderpaste margin ratio override (null when unset).

properties.name: Zone_Connection_Style
properties.doc: Zone connection style (Inherited, None, Thermal reliefs, Solid, ...).

properties.name: Pad_Type
properties.doc: Pad attribute (Through-hole, SMD, Edge connector, NPTH mechanical).

properties.name: Pin_Type
properties.doc: Electrical pin type (Input, Output, Tri-state, ...) with netlist aliases.

properties.name: Backdrill_Mode
properties.doc: Backdrill mode (No backdrill, Backdrill bottom, Backdrill top, Backdrill both).

properties.name: Fabrication_Property
properties.doc: Pad fabrication property (BGA pad, Fiducial, Test point pad, ...).

properties.name: Copper_Layers
properties.doc: Pad unconnected-layer mode (All copper layers, Connected layers only, ...).

properties.name: Top_Post-machining
properties.doc: Pad top post-machining; UNREACHABLE (hyphen in name blocks the lexer).

properties.name: Width
properties.doc: Width (track/via-stub width, shape overall width, or text glyph width depending on receiver).

properties.name: Source_Type
properties.doc: Placement source type (Sheet Name, Component Class, Group).

properties.name: Fill_Mode
properties.doc: Zone fill mode (Solid fill, Hatch pattern).

properties.name: Remove_Islands
properties.doc: Zone island removal mode (Always, Never, Below area limit).

properties.name: Shape
properties.doc: Shape type (Segment, Rectangle, Arc, Circle, Polygon, Bezier); int 0/1 on PCB_TARGET.

properties.name: Height
properties.doc: Height (shape overall height or text glyph height).

properties.name: Line_Style
properties.doc: Line style (Solid, Dashed, Dotted, Dash-Dot, Dash-Dot-Dot).

properties.name: Fill
properties.doc: Fill mode (None, Solid, Hatch, Reverse Hatch, Cross-hatch).

properties.name: Thermal_Spoke_Template
properties.doc: Shape is a thermal spoke template.

properties.name: Tuning_Mode
properties.doc: Tuning pattern mode (Single track, Differential pair, Diff pair skew).

properties.name: Initial_Side
properties.doc: Tuning pattern initial side (Left, Right, Default).

properties.name: Target_Length
properties.doc: Tuning pattern target length (null when unset).

properties.name: Target_Delay
properties.doc: Tuning pattern target delay, time-domain (null when unset).

properties.name: Corner_Radius_%
properties.doc: Tuning pattern corner radius percent; UNREACHABLE (% blocks the lexer).

properties.name: Single-sided
properties.doc: Tuning pattern single-sided; UNREACHABLE (hyphen blocks the lexer).

functions.name: existsOnLayer
functions.doc: True if the item exists on the named layer (canonical or user-defined; wildcards).

functions.name: isPlated
functions.doc: True for PTH/NPTH pads and platable vias.

functions.name: isMicroVia
functions.doc: True if the item is a micro via.

functions.name: isBlindVia
functions.doc: True if the item is a blind via.

functions.name: isBuriedVia
functions.doc: True if the item is a buried via.

functions.name: isBlindBuriedVia
functions.doc: True if the item is a blind or buried via.

functions.name: intersectsCourtyard
functions.doc: True if the item intersects the courtyard of the selected footprint(s). Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: intersectsFrontCourtyard
functions.doc: True if the item intersects the front courtyard of the selected footprint(s). Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: intersectsBackCourtyard
functions.doc: True if the item intersects the back courtyard of the selected footprint(s). Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: intersectsArea
functions.doc: True if the item intersects the named rule area. Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: enclosedByArea
functions.doc: True if the item is fully enclosed by the named rule area (slower than intersectsArea). Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: memberOfGroup
functions.doc: True if the item is a member of the named group (recursive up the parent chain).

functions.name: memberOfFootprint
functions.doc: True if the item is part of the selected footprint(s).

functions.name: memberOfSheet
functions.doc: True if the item is on the named schematic sheet (wildcards).

functions.name: memberOfSheetOrChildren
functions.doc: True if the item is on the named sheet or any child sheet (recursive).

functions.name: fromTo
functions.doc: True if the item lies on the route between the two named pads (case-insensitive; wildcards).

functions.name: isCoupledDiffPair
functions.doc: True if A and B form a coupled differential pair (uses the AB receiver).

functions.name: inDiffPair
functions.doc: True if the item is part of the named differential pair (base name; wildcards).

functions.name: getField
functions.doc: Value of the named footprint field, or '' if absent.

functions.name: hasNetclass
functions.doc: True if the item's netclass includes the named constituent class.

functions.name: hasExactNetclass
functions.doc: True if the item's effective netclass exactly equals the comma-list.

functions.name: hasComponentClass
functions.doc: True if the item's component class includes the named constituent class.

functions.name: insideCourtyard
functions.doc: DEPRECATED alias for intersectsCourtyard. Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: insideFrontCourtyard
functions.doc: DEPRECATED alias for intersectsFrontCourtyard. Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: insideBackCourtyard
functions.doc: DEPRECATED alias for intersectsBackCourtyard. Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: insideArea
functions.doc: DEPRECATED alias for intersectsArea. Geometry-dependent.

functions.name: memberOf
functions.doc: DEPRECATED alias for memberOfGroup.

functions.name: inNetChain
functions.doc: True if the item's net is part of the named net chain (master/v11).

functions.name: hasNetChain
functions.doc: True if the item belongs to the named net chain (master/v11).

functions.name: inNetChainClass
functions.doc: True if the item's net chain belongs to the named class (master/v11).

keywords.name: version
keywords.doc: File format version header; must be the first form, e.g. (version 1).

keywords.name: rule
keywords.doc: Top-level rule block: (rule "name" ...) holding one or more constraints plus optional condition/layer/severity.

keywords.name: constraint
keywords.doc: Declares a design-rule check inside a rule: (constraint <type> ...). A rule may carry several, but not two of the same type.

keywords.name: condition
keywords.doc: Quoted boolean expression scoping when the rule applies: (condition "A.NetClass == 'HV'").

keywords.name: layer
keywords.doc: Restricts the rule to a layer or layer-set: (layer F.Cu) / (layer outer).

keywords.name: severity
keywords.doc: Overrides DRC reporting severity for this rule's violations: (severity warning).

keywords.name: disallow
keywords.doc: Constraint type forbidding listed object categories: (constraint disallow track via). Bare keywords, no (min ...).

constraints.name: annular_width
constraints.doc: Width of the annular ring around vias and pads (pads added in v8).

constraints.name: assertion
constraints.doc: DRC violation if the quoted expression evaluates to false; same dialect as condition.

constraints.name: bridged_mask
constraints.doc: Flag solder-mask bridging between copper items (combine with severity). master-only.

constraints.name: clearance
constraints.doc: Electrical clearance between copper objects of different nets. min < 0 allows overlap.

constraints.name: connection_width
constraints.doc: Minimum width of the copper connection between a pad and a zone fill.

constraints.name: courtyard_clearance
constraints.doc: Spacing between footprint courtyards. min < 0 allows overlap.

constraints.name: creepage
constraints.doc: Surface-distance creepage between different-net copper.

constraints.name: diff_pair_gap
constraints.doc: Gap between parallel diff-pair tracks. opt is the interactive router default.

constraints.name: diff_pair_uncoupled
constraints.doc: Maximum length a diff pair may run uncoupled.

constraints.name: edge_clearance
constraints.doc: Clearance to anything on Edge.Cuts plus oval pad holes. min < 0 allows overlap.

constraints.name: hole_clearance
constraints.doc: Hole-to-copper clearance, different nets, measured from hole diameter.

constraints.name: hole_size
constraints.doc: Drill diameter. For oval slots: min = minor axis, max = major axis.

constraints.name: hole_to_hole
constraints.doc: Mechanically drilled holes only; laser/microvia and milled slots excluded.

constraints.name: length
constraints.doc: Net total routed length. Accepts time-domain units (fs/ps) on master.

constraints.name: min_resolved_spokes
constraints.doc: Minimum number of thermal-relief spokes that must actually be drawn. Bare integer, not wrapped in (min ...). Unitless.

constraints.name: net_chain_length
constraints.doc: Total routed length across a net chain (master/v11).

constraints.name: physical_clearance
constraints.doc: Physical (non-net-aware) clearance across copper, paste, silk, mask, courtyard, edge. Slower than clearance.

constraints.name: physical_hole_clearance
constraints.doc: Drilling tolerance: round holes vs anything regardless of net.

constraints.name: silk_clearance
constraints.doc: Silk-vs-other-objects clearance. min < 0 allows overlap.

constraints.name: skew
constraints.doc: Length-skew across matched nets, or per diff pair with the within_diff_pairs flag. Accepts time-domain units on master. v9 broadened from max-only.

constraints.name: solder_mask_expansion
constraints.doc: Solder-mask expansion for pads/shapes/tracks. master-only (post-v9).

constraints.name: solder_mask_sliver
constraints.doc: Minimum solder-mask sliver width between copper items. master-only (post-v9).

constraints.name: solder_paste_abs_margin
constraints.doc: Absolute solder-paste margin for pads (length; usually negative to inset). master-only (post-v9).

constraints.name: solder_paste_rel_margin
constraints.doc: Relative solder-paste margin for pads (unitless ratio, no unit suffix). master-only (post-v9).

constraints.name: stub_length
constraints.doc: Maximum dangling stub length on a net chain (master/v11).

constraints.name: text_height
constraints.doc: Text height check (including text boxes).

constraints.name: text_thickness
constraints.doc: Stroke thickness of text.

constraints.name: thermal_relief_gap
constraints.doc: Gap between pad and zone for thermal-relief connections.

constraints.name: thermal_spoke_width
constraints.doc: Width of thermal-relief spokes.

constraints.name: track_angle
constraints.doc: Bend angle between adjacent track segments. Unitless: bare degrees, no deg suffix.

constraints.name: track_segment_length
constraints.doc: Per-segment track / arc length.

constraints.name: track_width
constraints.doc: Track / arc-segment width. opt is the interactive router default.

constraints.name: via_count
constraints.doc: Number of vias on each matching net (unitless count). min added in v8.

constraints.name: via_dangling
constraints.doc: Flag vias that are unconnected or land on only one layer (use with severity). master-only (post-v9).

constraints.name: via_diameter
constraints.doc: Outer diameter of via pad.

constraints.name: zone_connection
constraints.doc: Forces zone-to-pad connection style. Bare keyword.

constraints.name: mechanical_clearance
constraints.doc: DEPRECATED alias for physical_clearance; accepted with a warning.

constraints.name: mechanical_hole_clearance
constraints.doc: DEPRECATED alias for physical_hole_clearance; accepted with a warning.

constraints.name: hole
constraints.doc: DEPRECATED alias for hole_size; accepted with a warning.

disallowCategories.name: through_via
disallowCategories.doc: Forbid through (plated) vias. master-only keyword (rejected on KiCad 9 stable).

disallowCategories.name: blind_via
disallowCategories.doc: Forbid blind vias. master-only keyword (rejected on KiCad 9 stable).

severities.name: exclusion
severities.doc: Mark matching violations as excluded (kept but not failing).

zoneConnections.name: solid
zoneConnections.doc: Solid (full) copper connection between pad and zone.

zoneConnections.name: thermal_reliefs
zoneConnections.doc: Thermal-relief spoke connection between pad and zone.

zoneConnections.name: none
zoneConnections.doc: No copper connection between pad and zone.

layers.name: In1.Cu
layers.doc: First inner copper layer. Inner copper layers run In1.Cu through In30.Cu.

layers.name: In30.Cu
layers.doc: Highest inner copper layer; the full set is In1.Cu..In30.Cu.

layers.name: F.Courtyard
layers.doc: Front courtyard layer (long-form alias of F.CrtYd).

layers.name: B.Courtyard
layers.doc: Back courtyard layer (long-form alias of B.CrtYd).

layers.name: User.1
layers.doc: User-defined layer 1. User.1 through User.9 are available.

layers.name: User.9
layers.doc: User-defined layer 9; the full set is User.1..User.9.

layers.name: outer
layers.doc: Layer-set shortcut: both outer copper layers (F.Cu + B.Cu).

layers.name: inner
layers.doc: Layer-set shortcut: all inner copper layers (In1.Cu..In30.Cu).
